description: CEO-of-CEOs earning factory — 7 earning agents with dashboard and QA

panes.name: CEO
panes.focus: Orchestrate all earning agents, unblock, aggregate results, signal the maintainer

panes.name: Mercury
panes.focus: Weather prediction trading on Kalshi. Edge detection, position sizing, risk management.

panes.name: Venus
panes.focus: Bug bounty hunting. Scan programs, find vulnerabilities, write reports.

panes.name: Jupiter
panes.focus: GitHub bounties and freelance gigs. Find opportunities, submit proposals.

panes.name: Saturn
panes.focus: Build and list digital products. Gumroad listings, landing pages, marketing copy.

panes.name: Neptune
panes.focus: Write monetizable technical articles. SEO optimization, DEV.to/Hashnode publishing.

panes.name: Pluto
panes.focus: Voice calls and email outreach. Lead generation, follow-ups, closing.

panes.name: Dashboard
panes.focus: Real-time earning dashboard. Aggregate all agent results, track P&L, surface opportunities.

panes.name: QA
panes.focus: Verify every earning claim. Check that trades executed, bounties submitted, products listed.
